Vegetarian Restaurants in Port Orange

Which vegetarian spots in Port Orange grade cleanest?5 of these 8 hold an A; FIRST WATCH RESTAURANT #248 tops them at a perfect 100/100.

8 vegetarian restaurants

  • A 100 F
    FIRST WATCH RESTAURANT #248 Other ★ 4.5 (1097) Port Orange · Volusia County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 99 C
    CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL STORE 1844 Mexican ★ 3.7 (1100) Port Orange · Volusia County VegGF +6 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 94 A
    APPLEBEES NEIGHBORHOOD GRILL & BAR American ★ 4 (2209) Port Orange · Volusia County VegGF +5 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 94 M

  • A 91 C

  • B 89 L

  • C 70 G
